title: Software Update - "1" or "2" tag on the tab if any component is outdated
scenario: Software Update tab badge count does not reflect number of outdated components (headset, stand, charging case)
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Ensure at least one Poly audio device component (headset, stand, or charging case) has an available firmware update.
Navigate to the Software Update tab (e.g., via Home → Software Update or bottom navigation).
Observe the numbered tag displayed on the Software Update tab icon or label.
expected: The Software Update tab displays a numbered tag (e.g., "1" or "2") indicating the count of components with available updates. If one component is outdated, a "1" tag appears. If two components are outdated, a "2" tag appears.
